variants: Modou Seck holds the Fractal Climatologist Badge, reflecting his expertise in the field of climate studies. Modou's efforts to impact his local community are evident through his role as Commissioner of Portbridge Youth Outreach. Additionally, he was supported in his academic pursuits by the Riverstone Scholarship Guild, which provided essential funding for his research.
